<!--
  👋 Before you finish this PR, please read this.

  Slopcafe is open source but NOT open contribution — it's a single-operator
  personal project and does not accept pull requests. This isn't unfriendliness;
  it's a poor fit for how the repo works (changes have to stay in lockstep across
  a documentation web that includes a byte-exact live mirror only the operator
  can publish, and the security-critical core needs in-house review). The full
  reasoning is in CONTRIBUTING.md.

  PRs opened here will be read and then closed with a pointer back to the issue
  tracker. No hard feelings — but to save you the effort, please instead:

    • Found a bug or have an idea?   → open an issue:
        https://github.com/Skylled/slopcafe/issues/new/choose
      (A link to a commit in your own fork is welcome as a reference.)

    • Found a security vulnerability? → report it privately, do NOT use a PR:
        https://github.com/Skylled/slopcafe/security

    • Just want to use or change the code? → fork it. The license is Apache-2.0
      and that's a real invitation.

  See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full contribution model.
-->

**Heads up: this project does not accept pull requests.** See
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/Skylled/slopcafe/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).

Please [open an issue](https://github.com/Skylled/slopcafe/issues/new/choose)
instead (a link to a commit in your fork is welcome as a reference), report
security issues [privately](https://github.com/Skylled/slopcafe/security), and
fork freely under [Apache-2.0](https://github.com/Skylled/slopcafe/blob/main/LICENSE).
